title: cyanus dominii subsp. sokolensis
intro: Cyanus dominii subsp. sokolensis, also known as a subspecies of the Cornflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cyanus dominii subsp. sokolensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments.
